Simon Holm

AI · SDU · Odense

5th-semester AI student at SDU. I'm interested in interpretability and what Danish and European AI sovereignty actually means in practice.

I chair the IMADA Fagråd — the student council for math & CS at my faculty. Outside that: sim racing, music, gaming.

I write study notes in Typst. If you want to learn Typst syntax there's a game I made for it: Typstnique.
